backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Helping Hand e-commerce backend, defining types and state for products, carts, reviews, orders, and user profiles, with Stripe integration, access control, and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that all occurrences of the old brand/store name have been replaced with 'Helping Hand' across the specified frontend files, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and brand-name update status of every page, component, and layout file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry file that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title set to 'Helping Hand - Smart Products. Smart Living.' that mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all 15 application routes and wraps the app in CartProvider and CurrencyProvider.
frontend/src/components/cart/AbandonedCa: Floating banner that appears after 3 seconds when the cart has items and is not open, prompting the user to view their cart, with session-based dismissal.
Slide-in cart drawer showing cart items with quantity controls and remove buttons, a subtotal, and a checkout link, built with a Sheet component.
frontend/src/components/chat/LiveChatWid: A floating live chat widget with open/minimize/close controls that responds to user messages using keyword-based auto-replies with a simulated typing delay.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Payment: A radio-button payment method selector supporting Stripe, PayPal, and UPI, with conditional inline form fields rendered based on the selected method.
frontend/src/components/home/BestSelling: Displays the top 8 highest-rated products fetched via a query hook in a responsive grid, with skeleton loading states and an empty state fallback.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: An auto-playing paginated carousel showing 3 customer reviews at a time with star ratings, pausing auto-play on manual navigation.
frontend/src/components/home/FeaturedCol: Renders a grid of six hardcoded product category cards with images, names, and product counts that link to the shop filtered by category.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: A full-width hero banner with a background image, headline, CTA buttons linking to the shop and categories pages, and trust indicator icons.
frontend/src/components/home/LimitedTime: A flash sale promotional section with a live countdown timer counting down 3 days from mount time and a link to the shop.
Newsletter subscription section component that validates email input, calls a subscribe mutation, and shows a success confirmation or error toast.
frontend/src/components/home/WhyChooseUs: Static section displaying four store benefit cards (shipping, security, returns, support) and a trust badges image.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, and contact details.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, product search form, currency selector, and cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/RootLayou: Root layout wrapper that composes Header, Footer, LiveChatWidget, AbandonedCartBanner, and a Toaster around the router Outlet.
frontend/src/components/product/ImageGal: Product image gallery showing a main image and four thumbnail buttons that switch the displayed image on click.
frontend/src/components/product/Quantity: Controlled quantity input component with increment/decrement buttons and configurable min/max bounds.
frontend/src/components/product/ReviewsS: Displays a list of product reviews with star ratings and provides a form for authenticated users to submit new reviews.
frontend/src/components/product/SocialSh: Renders Facebook and X (Twitter) share buttons that open pre-filled share dialogs for the current product URL.
frontend/src/components/shop/ProductCard: Renders a product card with image, rating, price (with optional discount), and add-to-cart functionality, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/components/shop/ProductFilt: Renders a sidebar filter panel with sort order, category selection, and min/max price range inputs, plus a reset button.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing a local shopping cart with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisted to localStorage with BigInt-safe serialization.
frontend/src/contexts/CurrencyContext.ts: Provides a React context for multi-currency support (USD, EUR, GBP, INR, AUD) with fixed exchange rates and a price formatting utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including products, categories, reviews, cart, and orders via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens including brand coral/orange accent colors.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility helpers including Tailwind class merging via `cn`, price formatting from cents, discount percentage calculation, and star rating renderer.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying company stats, origin story, mission, and values in card-based layout sections.
frontend/src/pages/CategoriesPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all product categories as image cards with product counts, linking each to the filtered shop page.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with a shipping address form, payment method selector, order summary, and order submission logic that navigates to a confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with company contact info cards and a validated contact form that simulates submission and shows a success state.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: FAQ page rendering a list of common questions and answers in an accordion component, with a prompt to contact support at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes multiple section components: hero, featured collections, best sellers, limited-time offers, reviews, why-choose-us, and newsletter.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays an order confirmation page showing order number, date, estimated delivery, and status after clearing the cart. Reads the orderId from URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure message with a 'Try Again' link that redirects the user back to the checkout page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment success confirmation message with a link to return to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a static privacy policy page with sections covering data collection, usage, sharing, security, cookies, user rights, and policy changes.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Renders a full product detail page including an image gallery, pricing with discount, quantity selector, add-to-cart/buy-now actions, trust badges, and a reviews section fetched by product ID.
frontend/src/pages/ReturnPolicyPage.tsx: Renders a static return and refund policy page detailing eligibility, return process, refund timelines, exchanges, and non-returnable items.
frontend/src/pages/ShippingPolicyPage.ts: Renders a static shipping policy page with summary badges and sections covering free shipping, express options, order processing, international shipping, tracking, and lost packages.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Product listing page with filtering by category, price range, and sort order, plus a mobile slide-out filter sheet. Uses memoized filtering/sorting logic over fetched products and categories.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Static Terms & Conditions page rendering 10 predefined legal sections (acceptance, use, pricing, payment, IP, disclaimers, etc.) in an accordion-style layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), OKLCH-based design tokens, coral color palette, custom shadows, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 5) describing the 'Helping Hand' dropshipping eCommerce site's architecture, existing features, known issues, and high-level requirements for all pages and functionality.
